name: timeline-roadmap
description: Evaluate and improve timeline and roadmap slides — phases, milestones, and sequencing logic
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with clear phase structure, milestone pacing, and readable roadmap chronology

prompts.text: Build a 12-month product launch roadmap with discovery, beta, launch, and scale phases plus major milestones
Build a post-merger integration timeline over 18 months with Day 1, stabilize, integrate, optimize phases
Build a cloud migration roadmap with assessment, pilot, migration waves, and decommissioning milestones
Build a cost transformation roadmap across quick wins, structural moves, and sustain phases
Build a regulatory remediation timeline with design, implementation, validation, and regulator sign-off milestones
Build a hiring roadmap for opening a new engineering hub with planning, recruiting, onboarding, and productivity ramp stages
Build an AI transformation roadmap for 2026 with foundation, pilot, scale, and operating model phases
Build a turnaround timeline with stabilize cash, improve margin, restart growth, and exit actions over four quarters
Build an ESG roadmap to 2030 with emissions baselining, supplier program, renewable rollout, and reporting milestones
Build a cyber maturity roadmap with identity, detection, response, and resilience milestones over six quarters
